name: Monnett
description: A social media platform made for humans — see your friends again with no AI algorithms, no ads, and full privacy.
longDescription:
Monnett is a social media platform built in Europe for people, not algorithms. It offers a chronological feed where you actually see your friends' posts — no AI curation, no targeted ads, and no data selling. With over 65,000 users, Monnett focuses on authentic social connections and privacy.

The platform is available on iOS and Android, and is committed to being a humane alternative to algorithm-driven social networks.
features: Customizable algorithm — full control over your feed
No shadowbans — your followers actually see your posts
No creepy profiling or data selling
Private chats stay private, no monitoring
Chronological feed option to see just your friends
